underlying_goal: Implementar una fase de SEO técnico en un sitio Laravel Blade, incluyendo HTML semántico, datos estructurados JSON-LD, sitemap dinámico, y mejoras de performance/accesibilidad, seguido de validación guiada paso a paso.
friction_detail: Assistant repeatedly used wrong Blade patterns (@push not working, @php conflicts, footer placement), ignored user's working examples, and over-engineered solutions instead of following the user's explicit architecture decisions.
brief_summary: User wanted technical SEO implementation and guided validation; most tasks were eventually completed but the session was riddled with friction due to the assistant ignoring user instructions, using incorrect Blade patterns, and making excessive unnecessary changes.
user_instructions_to_assistant: Use @push('scripts') + @verbatim pattern for JSON-LD without variables (based on quienesSomos.blade.php working example)
Move Organization JSON-LD to a dedicated @yield('jsonld') section in head, not footer
Generate dynamic JSON-LD from controller/action, not in Blade views
Stop and answer direct questions instead of proceeding with fixes
